zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelheid von Zutphen-Geldern於1089年出生在德國海因里希_海普洛文次可萊斯 蓋利吉陳-海斯格瓦瑟格時，她的父親Gerhard I. von Geldern-Wassenberg29歲，母親Clémence d'Aquitaine29歲。她和Ekbert I. Graf von Tecklenburg至少有3個兒子。她去世於1156年享年67歲。

meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Adelheid
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelheid von Zutphen-Geldern was born in 1089, in Wassenberg, Kreis Geilenkirchen-Heinsberg, Rhineland, Prussia, Germany, her father, Gerhard I. von Geldern-Wassenberg, was 29 and her mother, Clémence d'Aquitaine, was 29. She had at least 3 sons with Ekbert I. Graf von Tecklenburg. She died in 1156, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelheid von Zutphen-Geldern est née en 1089, à Wassenberg, Kreis Geilenkirchen-Heinsberg, Rhénanie, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Gerhard I. von Geldern-Wassenberg, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Clémence d'Aquitaine, avait 29 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec Ekbert I. Graf von Tecklenburg. Elle est décédée en 1156, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelheid von Zutphen-Geldern 1089 in Wassenberg, Kreis Geilenkirchen-Heinsberg, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gerhard I. von Geldern-Wassenberg 29 und ihre Mutter Clémence d'Aquitaine 29. it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid von Zutphen-Geldern è nata il nel 1089 nel Wassenberg, Kreis Geilenkirchen-Heinsberg, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Germania, sua padre, Gerhard I. von Geldern-Wassenberg, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Clémence d'Aquitaine, aveva 29 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli con Ekbert I. Graf von Tecklenburg. Morì nel 1156, all'età di 67 anni.

ko.Wassenberg, Rheinland, Prussia: 독일 플레우ss 리인플로빈츠 크레이스 그일렌커천-하인스버그 와센버그

ko.lifeSummary: Adelheid von Zutphen-Geldern(이)가 1089년 독일 플레우ss 리인플로빈츠 크레이스 그일렌커천-하인스버그 와센버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gerhard I. von Geldern-Wassenberg(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Clémence d'Aquitaine(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 Ekbert I. Graf von Tecklenburg(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1156년 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelheid von Zutphen-Geldern родилась в 1089 г. в местности вассенбирг, крис джиленкирчэн-хаинсбирг, раинпровинз, Пруссия, Германия, её отцу по имени Gerhard I. von Geldern-Wassenberg было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Clémence d'Aquitaine, 29. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына от Ekbert I. Graf von Tecklenburg. Она умерла в 1156 г. в возрасте 67 лет.
